hero.description: I am a Frontend Developer specialized in React, Next.js and TypeScript. I build modern, scalable and user-focused interfaces.

technologies.title: Technologies
technologies.description: This is the stack of technologies and tools I use to build modern web applications, prioritizing performance, scalability, and a solid user experience.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Projects that demonstrate my ability to build modern, scalable interfaces aligned with frontend best practices.

experiences.title: Experience
experiences.description: Professional experience building modern frontend interfaces focused on performance, scalability, and intuitive user experience.

description: Developed responsive and scalable web interfaces using Next.js, TypeScript, and Sass based on UI/UX designs.
Optimized existing components, improving performance, maintainability, and code quality.
Enhanced user experience through more intuitive and accessible interactions.
Integrated REST APIs to manage and display dynamic data.
Collaborated with designers and backend developers to implement new features.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Here I document my journey reconnecting with frontend development, reviewing fundamentals, learning new tools, and strengthening my skills along the way.
